title: Apple Unveils iPhone 17 with Enhanced Satellite Connectivity
dek: Apple announced the iPhone 17 on September 12, 2026, featuring dual‑satellite bands for global emergency messaging and a new low‑power GPS chip.

title: Tesla Beats Q2 2026 Earnings Expectations with $2.3 B Net Income
dek: Tesla reported a net income of $2.3 billion for the second quarter of 2026, surpassing analysts' consensus estimate of $1.9 billion, driven by record vehicle deliveries and higher software revenue.

title: FDA Grants Full Approval to Moderna’s mRNA Flu Vaccine
dek: The U.S. Food and Drug Administration issued full approval for Moderna’s mRNA‑based influenza vaccine on June 5, 2026, marking the first mRNA flu shot cleared for seasonal use.

title: gpt-4 turbo halves latency for enterprise apps
dek: OpenAI’s GPT‑4 Turbo delivers roughly 2× faster response times and costs about half as much as the original GPT‑4, making it a cost‑effective upgrade for customer‑facing AI solutions. For example, the model is priced at $0.003 per 1,000 tokens versus $0.006 for GPT‑4, enabling larger query volumes without inflating budgets.
